domain: Hepatocellular Carcinoma Formation Mechanisms and Liver Cancer Cell Variation Mechanisms

subspaces.name: Hepatic Progenitor Cell Dysregulation
subspaces.description: Role of aberrant activation, expansion, or differentiation failure of bipotent hepatic progenitor cells in HCC initiation and heterogeneity.
subspaces.probe_query: progenitor cell plasticity ductular reaction HSPC niche Notch/Wnt crosstalk cell-of-origin

subspaces.name: Clonal Evolution and Spatial Architecture
subspaces.description: Spatiotemporal reconstruction of clonal dynamics, subclonal architecture, and microenvironmental compartmentalization driving phenotypic variation in HCC.
subspaces.probe_query: phylogenetic tracing multi-region sampling tumor zonation spatial omics branching evolution

subspaces.name: Metabolic Reprogramming in Hepatocyte Transformation
subspaces.description: Mechanistic links between chronic metabolic stress (NAFLD/NASH), mitochondrial dysfunction, and epigenetic-metabolic coupling in malignant transformation.
subspaces.probe_query: acetyl-CoA flux α-ketoglutarate fatty acid oxidation NAD+/SIRT axis lipotoxicity-induced DNA damage

subspaces.name: Chromatin State Plasticity in Liver Cancer Cells
subspaces.description: Cell-to-cell variation in chromatin conformation, histone modifications, and 3D genome organization that enables transcriptional plasticity and therapy resistance.
subspaces.probe_query: ATAC-seq heterogeneity super-enhancer switching CTCF-mediated looping H3K27ac dynamics epigenetic memory

subspaces.name: Non-coding RNA Networks in HCC Initiation
subspaces.description: Functional roles of microRNAs, lncRNAs, and circRNAs in regulating oncogenic signaling, stemness, and intercellular communication during early HCC development.
subspaces.probe_query: miR-122 loss HULC circZKSCAN1 ceRNA networks exosomal ncRNA

subspaces.name: Immune-Mediated Selection Pressure in Preneoplasia
subspaces.description: How chronic inflammation, immune surveillance failure, and adaptive immune pressure shape clonal selection and phenotypic diversification in cirrhotic and dysplastic nodules.
subspaces.probe_query: CD8+ T cell dysfunction PD-L1+ hepatocytes IL-6/STAT3 inflammation loop senescent hepatocyte clearance MHC-I downregulation

subspaces.name: Transcription Factor Network Rewiring
subspaces.description: Context-specific rewiring of master transcription factors governing hepatocyte identity, leading to dedifferentiation, lineage infidelity, and oncogenic reprogramming.
subspaces.probe_query: FOXA1 chromatin opening HNF4α enhancer hijacking CEBPA isoform switching TF condensates lineage-specifying TFs

subspaces.name: Viral Integration-Driven Genomic Instability
subspaces.description: Mechanisms by which HBV DNA integration disrupts tumor suppressors (e.g., TERT, MLL4), induces structural variants, and generates fusion oncoproteins in virus-associated HCC.
subspaces.probe_query: HBV integrations TERT promoter insertion MLL4 truncation DNA repair deficiency viral enhancer insertion

user_interaction.question: Select the subspaces to prioritize before ZhiZhi imports papers. You can also add custom subspaces.

options.label: Hepatic Progenitor Cell Dysregulation
options.description: Role of aberrant activation, expansion, or differentiation failure of bipotent hepatic progenitor cells in HCC initiation and heterogeneity.

options.label: Clonal Evolution and Spatial Architecture
options.description: Spatiotemporal reconstruction of clonal dynamics, subclonal architecture, and microenvironmental compartmentalization driving phenotypic variation in HCC.

options.label: Metabolic Reprogramming in Hepatocyte Transformation
options.description: Mechanistic links between chronic metabolic stress (NAFLD/NASH), mitochondrial dysfunction, and epigenetic-metabolic coupling in malignant transformation.

options.label: Chromatin State Plasticity in Liver Cancer Cells
options.description: Cell-to-cell variation in chromatin conformation, histone modifications, and 3D genome organization that enables transcriptional plasticity and therapy resistance.

options.label: Non-coding RNA Networks in HCC Initiation
options.description: Functional roles of microRNAs, lncRNAs, and circRNAs in regulating oncogenic signaling, stemness, and intercellular communication during early HCC development.

options.label: Immune-Mediated Selection Pressure in Preneoplasia
options.description: How chronic inflammation, immune surveillance failure, and adaptive immune pressure shape clonal selection and phenotypic diversification in cirrhotic and dysplastic nodules.

options.label: Transcription Factor Network Rewiring
options.description: Context-specific rewiring of master transcription factors governing hepatocyte identity, leading to dedifferentiation, lineage infidelity, and oncogenic reprogramming.

options.label: Viral Integration-Driven Genomic Instability
options.description: Mechanisms by which HBV DNA integration disrupts tumor suppressors (e.g., TERT, MLL4), induces structural variants, and generates fusion oncoproteins in virus-associated HCC.

custom_subspace_input.placeholder: e.g. Demand Response; EV Charging Coordination; Building Energy Management
custom_subspace_input.instructions: If your target subfield is not listed, provide one subspace per line or semicolon-separated. These will be converted into custom retrieval branches.

user_interaction.continue_with: Pass subspace_map_id plus selected_subfields, or pass option labels as focus_branches to run_zhizhi_literature_analysis.
